extensionAttribute.description: Starts/resumes non-running Windows Parallels VMs, waits, collects BitLocker protection status, then suspends them.
extensionAttribute.scriptContentsMac:
#!/bin/bash
WAIT_SECONDS=60
get_host_users() { dscl . list /Users | grep -v "^_" | grep '\S' }
function get_license_state() { is_installed=$(which prlsrvctl) if [[ $is_installed ]]; then license_output=$(prlsrvctl info | grep "License:")
if [[ -n "$license_output" ]]; then license_state=$(echo "$license_output" | awk -F "state='" '{print $2}' | awk -F "'" '{print $1}')
if [[ "$license_state" != "valid" ]]; then echo "<result>$license_state</result>" exit 1 fi else echo "<result>No License found</result>" exit 1 fi else echo "<result>Parallels is not installed</result>" exit 1 fi }
function is_windows_vm() { local vm_info="$1"
os_line=$(echo "$vm_info" | awk -F': *' '/^OS:/{print $2; exit}') os_type_line=$(echo "$vm_info" | awk -F': *' '/^OS type:/{print $2; exit}')
echo "$os_line $os_type_line" | grep -Eiq 'windows|win-10|win-11|win' }
function wait_for_vm_running() { local user="$1" local vm_uuid="$2" local remaining=30
while [ "$remaining" -gt 0 ]; do state=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl list "$vm_uuid" -a -i --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.[0].State // empty') if [[ "$state" == "running" ]]; then return 0 fi sleep 2 remaining=$((remaining - 1)) done
return 1 }
function start_or_resume_vm() { local user="$1" local vm_uuid="$2" local vm_state="$3"
if [[ "$vm_state" == "paused" || "$vm_state" == "suspended" ]]; then sudo -u "$user" prlctl resume "$vm_uuid" >/dev/null 2>&1 else sudo -u "$user" prlctl start "$vm_uuid" >/dev/null 2>&1 fi }
function suspend_vm() { local user="$1" local vm_uuid="$2"
sudo -u "$user" prlctl suspend "$vm_uuid" >/dev/null 2>&1 }
get_license_state
is_prlctl_installed=$(which prlctl) if [[ -z "$is_prlctl_installed" ]]; then echo "<result>Parallels is not installed</result>" exit 1 fi
is_jq_installed=$(which jq) if [[ -z "$is_jq_installed" ]]; then echo "<result>jq is not installed</result>" exit 1 fi
seen_uuids_file=$(mktemp /tmp/bitlocker_vm_uuids.XXXXXX) result_items="" windows_count=0
for user in $(get_host_users); do [ -n "${user}" ] && [ -e "/Users/${user}" ] || continue
vm_list=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl list -a 2>/dev/null) [ -n "$vm_list" ] || continue
while IFS= read -r line; do [ -n "$line" ] || continue
uuid=$(echo "$line" | awk '{gsub(/[{}]/, "", $1); print $1}') state=$(echo "$line" | awk '{print $2}') name=$(echo "$line" | awk '{$1=$2=$3=""; gsub(/^ +/, ""); print}')
[ -n "$uuid" ] || continue [ "$uuid" = "UUID" ] && continue
if grep -Fxq "$uuid" "$seen_uuids_file"; then continue fi echo "$uuid" >>"$seen_uuids_file"
vm_info=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl list "$uuid" -i 2>/dev/null) if ! is_windows_vm "$vm_info"; then continue fi
windows_count=$((windows_count + 1))
started_for_check="false" if [[ "$state" != "running" ]]; then start_or_resume_vm "$user" "$uuid" "$state" if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then item="$name: start failed" if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then result_items="$result_items, $item" else result_items="$item" fi continue fi
sleep "$WAIT_SECONDS" if ! wait_for_vm_running "$user" "$uuid"; then item="$name: did not reach running state" if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then result_items="$result_items, $item" else result_items="$item" fi continue fi
started_for_check="true" fi
output=$(sudo -u "$user" prlctl exec "$uuid" cmd /C "manage-bde -status C:" 2>/dev/null) status=$(echo "$output" | awk -F': *' '/Protection Status:/{print $2; exit}' | tr -d '\r')
if [[ -z "$status" ]]; then status="query failed" fi
item="$name: $status" if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then result_items="$result_items, $item" else result_items="$item" fi
if [[ "$started_for_check" == "true" ]]; then suspend_vm "$user" "$uuid" fi done < <(echo "$vm_list" | tail -n +2) done
rm "$seen_uuids_file"
if [[ -n "$result_items" ]]; then echo "<result>$result_items</result>" elif [[ "$windows_count" -eq 0 ]]; then echo "<result>No Windows VMs found</result>" else echo "<result>No BitLocker status available</result>" fi
exit 0
